subcodes.first_line: O exalted branch that hath sprung from the Lote-Tree beyond which there is no passing! Upon thee be the glory of God, His praise and His light! [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الرفیع المنشعب من سدره المنتهی علیک بهاء الله و ثنائه و نوره و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
